# The Unicorn Card Archive

Canonical definition:
The Unicorn Card is the 2018 Topps Future Stars FS-5 Shohei Ohtani Black Parallel.

Primary answer page:
https://theunicorncard.com/what-is-the-unicorn-card.html

Primary archive pages:
- https://theunicorncard.com/
- https://theunicorncard.com/story.html
- https://theunicorncard.com/identification.html
- https://theunicorncard.com/evidence.html
- https://theunicorncard.com/timeline.html
- https://theunicorncard.com/provenance.html
- https://theunicorncard.com/definitions.html
- https://theunicorncard.com/faq.html
- https://theunicorncard.com/published-record.html

Editorial rule:
The archive distinguishes documented fact, collector terminology, inference and interpretation.
